component.name: Papyrus
component.summary: Animated wallpaper manager for Pop!_OS COSMIC

description.p: Papyrus is a free, open-source animated wallpaper manager designed for Pop!_OS COSMIC. Pick any video file and it becomes your live wallpaper — no accounts, no telemetry, no Wallpaper Engine required.

ul.li: Animated wallpapers from MP4, WebM, MKV, AVI and MOV files
Auto-theme — extracts the dominant color and applies it as your COSMIC accent
Auto dark/light mode based on wallpaper brightness
Playlist rotation with configurable interval and random/sequential order
Thumbnail previews auto-generated from your video files
No telemetry, no accounts, no cloud

description.p: Playlist rotation, improved Flatpak support, bug fixes.

ul.li: Auto-rotate wallpapers at a configurable interval (random or sequential order)
Flatpak build system with full COSMIC theme integration

description.p: UI redesign, COSMIC theme integration, Dark/Light auto mode.

ul.li: Auto-theme: sync COSMIC accent with wallpaper dominant color
Auto dark/light mode based on wallpaper brightness
Flatpak sandbox support with host mpvpaper
